name: My work comp claim for occupational hearing loss got denied, what are my next steps in West Valley City?
description: Appeal within 20 days to Labor Commission with better proof; get lawyer[2].

mainEntity.name: My work comp claim for occupational hearing loss got denied, what are my next steps in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20 days to Labor Commission with better proof; get lawyer[2].
acceptedAnswer.description:
Appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial.

Denials common if causation unproven; idiopathic or non-work factors cited[2][3].

- Gather more medical proof.
- Request hearing with new evidence.
- Consider attorney for appeal.

Appeals succeed with stronger evidence; don't delay or rights lapse.
